# GameDrawer

A local-first iOS drawer of classic logic games. Minesweeper at v1.0, with more games on the way. No ads, no accounts, no tracking — fully theme-customizable.

## Product
- iOS app: launching soon (App Store URL pending)
- Free to download. No in-app purchases, no subscriptions, no fake currency.
- Built and operated by Lauterstar (https://lauterstar.com).
- Part of the Lauterstar ecosystem alongside DesignKit, HabitTracker, Stack, and PantryPlanner.

## Key Pages
- Home: https://gamedrawer.lauterstar.com/
- About: https://gamedrawer.lauterstar.com/about.html
- Updates / Release notes: https://gamedrawer.lauterstar.com/updates.html
- Press kit: https://gamedrawer.lauterstar.com/press.html
- Support: https://gamedrawer.lauterstar.com/support.html
- Privacy Policy: https://gamedrawer.lauterstar.com/privacy.html
- Terms of Service: https://gamedrawer.lauterstar.com/terms.html

## What GameDrawer does
- Minesweeper: three difficulties (Easy 9x9 / Medium 16x16 / Hard 16x30), first-tap safety, flood-fill auto-reveal.
- Local-first stats: best times, win percentages, and game records stored on-device via SwiftData.
- No ads, ever: no banner ads, no forced video ads, no fake currency, no subscription pestering.
- 34 theme presets across six DesignKit families (Classic, Sweet, Bright, Soft, Moody, Loud) plus a custom palette editor.
- Stats: per-difficulty bests, lifetime totals, full record table, JSON export and re-import.
- Optional iCloud sync via Sign in with Apple — off by default.

## Audience
Players who want classic logic games without ads, fake coins, energy meters, or required onboarding. People who care about quiet, theme-customizable play.

## Contact
- Support email: support@lauterstar.com
